required_preferences.fact: Coordinates grocery shopping for her mother with her sisters and son, often delegating shopping tasks and deliveries as needed due to increased caregiving demands

supersedes.fact: Shops for her mother every Saturday morning — never delegates this responsibility, even when busy

required_preferences.fact: Sets a nightly alarm to begin winding down for bed by 9:00 pm — strictly avoids all caffeine, even in the morning, as required by cardiologist

supersedes.fact: Sets a nightly alarm as a cue to begin winding down for bed by 10:00 pm — refrains from caffeine after 2:00 pm

required_preferences.fact: Explores independent European bookstores and cafes near her host university, avoiding chain establishments while abroad
Brings a portable heart rate monitor and medication to work, checking vitals before and after meetings to proactively manage atrial fibrillation symptoms
Accepts a limited number of peer review assignments per semester — declines additional requests to protect research time
Proactively arranges video check-ins with her husband and son after his late meetings to maintain evening family connection

persona: A mid-career sociologist with multiple published journal articles
